name: drawtoboq-estimate-worker
description: VPS background worker for /api/projects/[id]/estimate. Receives kickoff from Vercel lambda, calls the existing ai-aas gateway with the prepared payload, runs post-processing (enrich + empty-check + cache + status writes), and lets Vercel return 202 immediately. Removes the Pro-plan 300s lambda cap from the Run-to-BOQ path.
